example_tasks: Follow up on delayed supply order
Check status of lost warehouse shipment
Address customer complaint regarding incomplete order

reasoning: The icon combines a physical object (box) with a clear indicator of a problem (exclamation mark), making it highly effective for tasks related to logistics, inventory management, or order fulfillment issues.
